reviews.comment:
Normal, como cualquier otra estación de servicio, ya que uno solo va a cargar combustible y continúa viaje en mi caso es ir casi siempre ya que resido ahí

(Translated by Google)
Normal, like any other gas station, since you just go to refuel and continue your journey; in my case, I go almost every day since I live there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtXzV2b013EAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar ideal para tomar un descanso y tomar un café con las personas o familia que comparten el viaje a Buenos Aires o a la costa con un amplio surtidos de media lunas y tortas caseras para el deleite de los transeúntes
Con buenos precios y una muy buena atención , sin mucha espera de por medio un rico café o cortado relajar las piernas y continuar el viaje
Y en caso de viajar a la costa , nada mejor que al regreso hacer una parada para visitar este excelente lugar y poder tomar un descanso para luego continuar el viaje de regreso para la zona de Buenos Aires

(Translated by Google)
An ideal spot to take a break and enjoy a coffee with friends or family traveling to Buenos Aires or the coast. They offer a wide selection of croissants and homemade cakes to delight passersby. With good prices and excellent service, and minimal wait times, you can enjoy a delicious coffee or cortado, relaxing your legs before continuing your journey. And if you're traveling to the coast, there's nothing better than stopping at this excellent place on your way back to Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtMS1tbDVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las mejores medialunas de la ruta 2?? Sin dudas acá las encontrarás, el acceso en pedimos estado y bastante "peligroso". La atención excelente

(Translated by Google)
The best croissants on Route 2? You'll definitely find them here. The access road is in poor condition and quite "dangerous." Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtLTdHRWJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Me encantó el lugar que tienen para descanso del viajero. Mesas, bancos, sombra, agua, tranquilidad...
Es una pena que haya tantos viajeros irrespondables. Mugrientos!!! Se van y dejan todo sucio. Botellas vacías tiradas, envases, servilletas... Me dio vergüenza ajena

(Translated by Google)
I loved the rest area they have for travelers. Tables, benches, shade, water, tranquility... It's a shame there are so many irresponsible travelers. Filthy! They leave and leave everything dirty. Empty bottles lying around, containers, napkins... I was embarrassed for them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtaFlPWHlBRRAB
